opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has blown up like a balloon, the cramps are unbearable, and I haven't been able to pass wind all evening.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bloating and cramps came on hard this evening after dinner and they're much worse than my usual gut trouble — I'm scared I've got a blockage.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago, after a big pasta dinner
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 hours and it hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: intense bloating with cramping, colicky pain that comes in waves across the whole belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are unbearable, much sharper and more constant than my usual bloating
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my tummy, not in one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves but keeps building through the evening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — I've been pacing and shifting around trying to get comfortable
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I haven't been sick or thrown up, I don't have a fever, and the pain isn't stuck down in my lower right side
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get on-and-off bloating and gripey tummy for months, and I've been told it's probably IBS, but nothing like tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit still or settle — I've been walking around the flat all evening

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing on-and-off bloating and gut cramps, told it was probably IBS
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter tummy tablets now and then when it flares

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on her own; independent; says her home is tidy and safe with the bathroom easy to reach

objective_data_offered.value: my belly is visibly swollen and blown up tight, and I keep changing position because I can't get comfortable
36.8 degrees, I checked it with the thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
